THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHILLINGER, BEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $360.00 FILED BY SCHILLINGER, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-22-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-20-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
IS'S HEREBY ORDERED THAT DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONT. IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO NOTICE TO PLTF. SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN.
PLAINTIFF B. SCHILLINGER REQUEST TO CONTINUE HRG DATE TO FEBRUARY 7, 1999 AT 3:30 PM SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSINER FOR APPROVAL. PLTF.HAS IFP.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-28-1999, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-07-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
